cases.description: A completed method stage cannot lose the main results JSON while keeping Method Gate green.
A finished workspace cannot point latest_handoff back to an earlier handoff card.
cases.expected_error: latest_handoff must point to the Stage 9 handoff

cases.description: A long-running Stage 0-9 run must retain reset-boundary coverage for every stage.
A stage log cannot omit a key artifact that the stage contract requires.
cases.expected_error: stage 2 log does not mention artifact: 02_data/sample_audit.md

cases.description: Publication table numbers must remain reconcilable to main_results.json.
cases.expected_error: workspace gate checker did not prove OK: reconcile

cases.description: A final quality/submission state cannot keep a citation in to-verify status.
Draft Quality Gate cannot remain pass when Method Gate is downgraded after the fact.
A finished submission handoff cannot ship a FINAL_REPORT that still contains template placeholders.
